content: Preschool teachers favor a shrinking color wedge/pie as the most concrete signal for a 3-year-old. Minimalist shrinking-bar timers with no login/setup are preferred for simple use cases. Common complaints across existing apps: overly loud/harsh default ticking or alarm sounds with no easy way to lower them, coarse duration-adjustment granularity (e.g. only 10s increments), ad-supported free tiers limiting customization (e.g. one picture only). Guidance: avoid excessive animation/visual clutter that defeats the at-a-glance purpose.
